20.4: kai idon thronous kai ekathisan ep autous kai krima edothē autois kai tas psuchas tōn pepelekismenōn dia tēn marturian iēsou kai dia ton logon tou theou kai oitines ou prosekunēsan to thērion oude tēn eikona autou kai ouk elabon to charagma epi to metōpon kai epi tēn cheira autōn kai ezēsan kai ebasileusan meta tou christou chilia etē
20.5: oi loipoi tōn nekrōn ouk ezēsan achri telesthē ta chilia etē autē ē anastasis ē prōtē
20.6: makarios kai agios o echōn meros en tē anastasei tē prōtē epi toutōn o deuteros thanatos ouk echei exousian alla esontai iereis tou theou kai tou christou kai basileusousin met autou ta chilia etē
20.7: kai otan telesthē ta chilia etē luthēsetai o satanas ek tēs phulakēs autou
20.8: kai exeleusetai planēsai ta ethnē ta en tais tessarsin gōniais tēs gēs ton gōg kai magōg sunagagein autous eis ton polemon ōn o arithmos autōn ōs ē ammos tēs thalassēs
20.9: kai anebēsan epi to platos tēs gēs kai ekukleusan tēn parembolēn tōn agiōn kai tēn polin tēn ēgapēmenēn kai katebē pur ek tou ouranou kai katephagen autous
20.10: kai o diabolos o planōn autous eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou puros kai tou theiou opou kai to thērion kai o pseudoprophētēs kai basanisthēsontai ēmeras kai nuktos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
20.11: kai eidon thronon megan leukon kai ton kathēmenon ep auton ou apo tou prosōpou ephugen ē gē kai o ouranos kai topos ouch eurethē autois
20.12: kai eidon tous nekrous tous megalous kai tous mikrous estōtas enōpion tou thronou kai biblia ēnoichthēsan kai allo biblion ēnoichthē o estin tēs zōēs kai ekrithēsan oi nekroi ek tōn gegrammenōn en tois bibliois kata ta erga autōn
20.13: kai edōken ē thalassa tous nekrous tous en autē kai o thanatos kai o adēs edōkan tous nekrous tous en autois kai ekrithēsan ekastos kata ta erga autōn
20.14: kai o thanatos kai o adēs eblēthēsan eis tēn limnēn tou puros outos o thanatos o deuteros estin ē limnē tou puros
20.15: kai ei tis ouch eurethē en tē biblō tēs zōēs gegrammenos eblēthē eis tēn limnēn tou puros

21.1: kai eidon ouranon kainon kai gēn kainēn o gar prōtos ouranos kai ē prōtē gē apēlthan kai ē thalassa ouk estin eti
21.2: kai tēn polin tēn agian ierousalēm kainēn eidon katabainousan ek tou ouranou apo tou theou ētoimasmenēn ōs numphēn kekosmēmenēn tō andri autēs
21.3: kai ēkousa phōnēs megalēs ek tou thronou legousēs idou ē skēnē tou theou meta tōn anthrōpōn kai skēnōsei met autōn kai autoi laoi autou esontai kai autos o theos estai met autōn
21.4: kai exaleipsei pan dakruon ek tōn ophthalmōn autōn kai thanatos ouk estai eti oute penthos oute kraugē oute ponos ouk estai eti oti ta prōta apēlthan
21.5: kai eipen o kathēmenos epi tō thronō idou kaina poiō panta kai legei grapson oti outoi oi logoi pistoi kai alēthinoi eisin
21.6: kai eipen moi gegonan egō to alpha kai to ō ē archē kai to telos egō tō dipsōnti dōsō autō ek tēs pēgēs tou udatos tēs zōēs dōrean
21.7: o nikōn klēronomēsei tauta kai esomai autō theos kai autos estai moi uios
21.8: tois de deilois kai apistois kai ebdelugmenois kai phoneusin kai pornois kai pharmakois kai eidōlolatrais kai pasin tois pseudesin to meros autōn en tē limnē tē kaiomenē puri kai theiō o estin o thanatos o deuteros
21.9: kai ēlthen eis ek tōn epta angelōn tōn echontōn tas epta phialas tōn gemontōn tōn epta plēgōn tōn eschatōn kai elalēsen met emou legōn deuro deixō soi tēn numphēn tēn gunaika tou arniou
21.10: kai apēnenken me en pneumati epi oros mega kai upsēlon kai edeixen moi tēn polin tēn agian ierousalēm katabainousan ek tou ouranou apo tou theou
21.11: echousan tēn doxan tou theou o phōstēr autēs omoios lithō timiōtatō ōs lithō iaspidi krustallizonti
21.12: echousa teichos mega kai upsēlon echousa pulōnas dōdeka kai epi tois pulōsin angelous dōdeka kai onomata epigegrammena a estin tōn dōdeka phulōn uiōn israēl
21.13: apo anatolēs pulōnes treis kai apo borra pulōnes treis kai apo notou pulōnes treis kai apo dusmōn pulōnes treis
21.14: kai to teichos tēs poleōs echōn themelious dōdeka kai ep autōn dōdeka onomata tōn dōdeka apostolōn tou arniou
21.15: kai o lalōn met emou eichen metron kalamon chrusoun ina metrēsē tēn polin kai tous pulōnas autēs kai to teichos autēs
21.16: kai ē polis tetragōnos keitai kai to mēkos autēs oson kai to platos kai emetrēsen tēn polin tō kalamō epi stadiōn dōdeka chiliadōn to mēkos kai to platos kai to upsos autēs isa estin
21.17: kai emetrēsen to teichos autēs ekaton tesserakonta tessarōn pēchōn metron anthrōpou o estin angelou
21.18: kai ē endōmēsis tou teichous autēs iaspis kai ē polis chrusion katharon omoion ualō katharō
21.19: oi themelioi tou teichous tēs poleōs panti lithō timiō kekosmēmenoi o themelios o prōtos iaspis o deuteros sappheiros o tritos chalkedōn o tetartos smaragdos
21.20: o pemptos sardonux o ektos sardion o ebdomos chrusolithos o ogdoos bērullos o enatos topazion o dekatos chrusoprasos o endekatos uakinthos o dōdekatos amethustos
21.21: kai oi dōdeka pulōnes dōdeka margaritai ana eis ekastos tōn pulōnōn ēn ex enos margaritou kai ē plateia tēs poleōs chrusion katharon ōs ualos diaugēs
21.22: kai naon ouk eidon en autē o gar kurios o theos o pantokratōr naos autēs estin kai to arnion
21.23: kai ē polis ou chreian echei tou ēliou oude tēs selēnēs ina phainōsin autē ē gar doxa tou theou ephōtisen autēn kai o luchnos autēs to arnion
21.24: kai peripatēsousin ta ethnē dia tou phōtos autēs kai oi basileis tēs gēs pherousin tēn doxan autōn eis autēn
21.25: kai oi pulōnes autēs ou mē kleisthōsin ēmeras nux gar ouk estai ekei
21.26: kai oisousin tēn doxan kai tēn timēn tōn ethnōn eis autēn
21.27: kai ou mē eiselthē eis autēn pan koinon kai o poiōn bdelugma kai pseudos ei mē oi gegrammenoi en tō bibliō tēs zōēs tou arniou

22.1: kai edeixen moi potamon udatos zōēs lampron ōs krustallon ekporeuomenon ek tou thronou tou theou kai tou arniou
22.2: en mesō tēs plateias autēs kai tou potamou enteuthen kai ekeithen xulon zōēs poiōn karpous dōdeka kata mēna ekaston apodidous ton karpon autou kai ta phulla tou xulou eis therapeian tōn ethnōn
22.3: kai pan katathema ouk estai eti kai o thronos tou theou kai tou arniou en autē estai kai oi douloi autou latreusousin autō
22.4: kai opsontai to prosōpon autou kai to onoma autou epi tōn metōpōn autōn
22.5: kai nux ouk estai eti kai ouk echousin chreian phōtos luchnou kai phōtos ēliou oti kurios o theos phōtiei ep autous kai basileusousin eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
22.6: kai eipen moi outoi oi logoi pistoi kai alēthinoi kai o kurios o theos tōn pneumatōn tōn prophētōn apesteilen ton angelon autou deixai tois doulois autou a dei genesthai en tachei
22.7: kai idou erchomai tachu makarios o tērōn tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou
22.8: kagō iōannēs o blepōn kai akouōn tauta kai ote ēkousa kai eblepsa epesa proskunēsai emprosthen tōn podōn tou angelou tou deiknuontos moi tauta
22.9: kai legei moi ora mē sundoulos sou eimi kai tōn adelphōn sou tōn prophētōn kai tōn tērountōn tous logous tou bibliou toutou tō theō proskunēson
22.10: kai legei moi mē sphragisēs tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou o kairos gar engus estin
22.11: o adikōn adikēsatō eti kai o ruparos rupanthētō eti kai o dikaios dikaiosunēn poiēsatō eti kai o agios agiasthētō eti
22.12: idou erchomai tachu kai o misthos mou met emou apodounai ekastō ōs to ergon estin autou
22.13: egō to alpha kai to ō o prōtos kai o eschatos ē archē kai to telos
22.14: makarioi oi plunontes tas stolas autōn ina estai ē exousia autōn epi to xulon tēs zōēs kai tois pulōsin eiselthōsin eis tēn polin
22.15: exō oi kunes kai oi pharmakoi kai oi pornoi kai oi phoneis kai oi eidōlolatrai kai pas poiōn kai philōn pseudos
22.16: egō iēsous epempsa ton angelon mou marturēsai umin tauta epi tais ekklēsiais egō eimi ē riza kai to genos daueid o astēr o lampros o prōinos
22.17: kai to pneuma kai ē numphē legousin erchou kai o akouōn eipatō erchou kai o dipsōn erchesthō o thelōn labetō udōr zōēs dōrean
22.18: marturō egō panti tō akouonti tous logous tēs prophēteias tou bibliou toutou ean tis epithē ep auta epithēsei ep auton o theos tas plēgas tas gegrammenas en tō bibliō toutō
22.19: kai ean tis aphelē apo tōn logōn tou bibliou tēs prophēteias tautēs aphelei o theos to meros autou apo tou xulou tēs zōēs kai ek tēs poleōs tēs agias tōn gegrammenōn en tō bibliō toutō
22.20: legei o marturōn tauta nai erchomai tachu amēn erchou kurie iēsou
22.21: ē charis tou kuriou iēsou meta pantōn
